cb_step_1.title: Create Cranial Segmentation
cb_step_1.instruction: Open Segmentation Editor module, create new segmentation named 'Cranial_Segmentation'.

cb_step_2.title: Select Source Volume
cb_step_2.instruction: Pick the volume to use for segmentation.

cb_step_3.title: Add Cranial Segment
cb_step_3.instruction: Click 'Add' to create a new segment named 'Cranial_Segment'.

cb_step_4.title: Open Threshold Tool
cb_step_4.instruction: Click the 'Threshold' button to open threshold settings.

cb_step_5.title: Set Threshold Range
cb_step_5.instruction: Enter the lowest and largest threshold values.

cb_step_7.title: Select Skull Mask
cb_step_7.instruction: Pick the segment node that represents the skull mask.

cb_step_8.title: Load Skull Mask
cb_step_8.instruction: Click 'Load Skull Mask' to load the selected mask.

cb_step_9.title: Add ROI
cb_step_9.instruction: Click 'Add ROI' to create a region of interest.

cb_step_10.title: Adjust ROI Boundary
cb_step_10.instruction: Drag the ROI handles to enclose the skull region.

cb_step_11.title: Crop to ROI
cb_step_11.instruction: Click 'Crop to ROI' to crop the segmentation to the ROI.

cb_step_12.title: Create Closed Curve
cb_step_12.instruction: Switch to Markups module, click 'Closed Curve' to create a closed curve.

cb_step_13.title: Draw Curve Around Defect
cb_step_13.instruction: Click on the skull model to place points defining the closed curve around the fracture.

cb_step_14.title: Select Curved Node
cb_step_14.instruction: Choose the curve node from the list.

cb_step_15.title: Cut Defect
cb_step_15.instruction: Click 'Cut Defect' to remove the fractured region.

cb_step_16.title: Generate Implant
cb_step_16.instruction: Click 'Generate Implant' to create the implant model.

operation_descriptions: Create a new segmentation node with name 'Cranial_Segmentation'
Add a new segment named 'Cranial_Segment' to the segmentation
Open the Threshold effect in Segmentation Editor
Apply the threshold effect to create initial segmentation
Create a new closed curve markup node
Create a new segmentation node with name 'Cranial_Segmentation'
Add a new segment named 'Cranial_Segment' to the segmentation
Open the Threshold effect in Segmentation Editor
Apply the threshold effect to create initial segmentation
Load the selected skull mask segment into the extension
Add an ROI markup node for defining the skull region
Manually adjust the boundary of the ROI to keep the skull part.
Crop the skull mask to the ROI
Create a new closed curve markup node
Manually draw the curve on the skull model to include the fractured skull part.
Manually draw the curve on the skull model to include the fractured skull part.
Cut the defect region from the skull mask using the selected curve
Generate the implant from the defect region
